markets.question: New Rihanna Album before GTA VI?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Rihanna officially releases a new album before Grand Theft Auto VI is officially released in the US. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If neither occurs by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to 50-50.

For the purposes of this market, "release" refers to the game becoming publicly available for purchase or download in the US. Early access, beta versions, other forms of pre-release availability, or leaks will not count as an official release. If the release is only for certain consoles (e.g. Xbox Series X/S) it will count.

The resolution source for the release of GTA VI is official information from Rockstar Games or its parent company, Take-Two Interactive.

Officially released means that a newly released album is officially available for download or streaming (not including live events) by the resolution date.

Re-releases, deluxe editions, compilations, or greatest hits albums will not count, unless they contain at least 50% tracks that have never been officially released in any format prior to the album's release.

The resolution source for the album release will be any official streaming or download site, e.g. Apple Music or Spotify.

events.title: What will happen before GTA VI?
events.description: This is a market on predicting events that will occur before the release of Grand Theft Auto VI.

eventMetadata.context_description: Rockstar's repeated delays have pushed Grand Theft Auto VI to a November 19, 2026 launch on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X/S, extending the window for major events to unfold first and shaping trader sentiment around geopolitical, music, and tech milestones. Official statements from the studio emphasize additional polish after missing the prior May 2026 target, which traders interpret as creating room for outcomes like a Russia-Ukraine ceasefire or high-profile album drops such as Drake's Iceman. Market-implied odds reflect this uncertainty, with frontrunners driven by current news cycles on ceasefires and AI advancements like GPT-6 rather than any single confirmed timeline. Upcoming catalysts include Take-Two earnings calls that could signal further shifts and major industry events through summer 2026, where fresh developments in streaming metrics or celebrity releases could quickly alter positions in this high-volume prediction market.

markets.question: Will Harvey Weinstein be sentenced to no prison time?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the prison sentence, if any, imposed on Harvey Weinstein as part of his ongoing New York retrial (People of the State of New York v. Harvey Weinstein) by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve immediately based on the first sentence rendered in this case, regardless of any appeals. If Weinstein is found not guilty, there is a mistrial, or if the first sentencing does not include any jail or prison time, this market will resolve to "No Prison Time."

If no sentencing takes place by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will also resolve to "No Prison Time."

If the sentence falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

For the purposes of this market, it does not matter whether the sentence is concurrent or consecutive to any existing sentence Weinstein is already serving. The market will resolve based on the total prison sentence imposed in this case.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the New York court system or other involved U.S. government sources; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: The recent mistrial in Harvey Weinstein’s third New York retrial on May 15, 2026—ending with a deadlocked jury after three days of deliberations—has sharply boosted trader consensus around minimal or no additional prison time for the former Hollywood producer. With prosecutors now deciding whether to pursue a fourth trial on the Jessica Mann allegations, the unresolved #MeToo-era case leaves open pathways for appeals or dismissal that could limit further New York exposure. Weinstein’s existing California conviction and consecutive sentencing remain subject to ongoing legal challenges, while his advanced age and documented health issues further tilt market-implied odds heavily toward the leading “No Prison Time” outcome. Upcoming hearings in June add near-term catalysts that could shift these probabilities.

events.title: 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NHL Stanley Cup championship.

eventMetadata.context_description: The four remaining teams in the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs—Colorado Avalanche, Carolina Hurricanes, Vegas Golden Knights, and Montreal Canadiens—enter the conference finals with closely bunched implied probabilities reflecting their strong regular-season finishes and recent playoff momentum. The Avalanche and Hurricanes, the top two teams overall, posted the best combined record through the first two rounds while demonstrating elite depth and goaltending. Vegas has shown resilience in advancing despite a lower regular-season point total, while the Canadiens' unexpected run past the Sabres in a Game 7 overtime thriller underscores their rising contender status. This balanced field, with proven matchups and no dominant frontrunner, keeps the championship race competitive heading into the final stages.

eventMetadata.context_description: The four remaining teams in the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs—Colorado Avalanche, Carolina Hurricanes, Vegas Golden Knights, and Montreal Canadiens—enter the conference finals with closely bunched implied probabilities reflecting their strong regular-season finishes and recent playoff momentum. This balanced field, with proven matchups and no dominant frontrunner, keeps the championship race competitive heading into the final stages.

events.title: 2026 NBA Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NBA Finals.

eventMetadata.context_description: Oklahoma City Thunder traders see the highest implied probability at 49.5% due to the team's league-best 64-18 regular-season record, status as defending champions, and home-court advantage in a tied 1-1 Western Conference Finals series against the Spurs. San Antonio's 29.8% reflects its rapid rise to a 62-20 mark and deep playoff run powered by Victor Wembanyama's rim protection and De'Aaron Fox's playmaking. The New York Knicks at 19.6% benefit from a strong 53-29 Eastern Conference campaign and a 2-0 East Finals lead over Cleveland, though facing a deeper Western opponent poses challenges. The Cavaliers' low 1.8% stems from their role as underdogs in the East Finals despite a solid 52-30 season.

markets.question: Will Spain win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the national team that wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

If at any point it becomes impossible for this team to win the FIFA World Cup based on the rules of FIFA (e.g., they are eliminated in the knockout stage), this market will resolve immediately to “No”.

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is permanently canceled or has not been completed by October 13, 2026, 11:59 PM this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from FIFA, however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: The closely bunched probabilities among France, Spain, and England reflect a deep pool of European sides with elite squad depth, recent major-tournament pedigree, and favorable group-stage positioning as the expanded 48-team FIFA World Cup approaches. Spain’s Euro 2024 triumph and ongoing possession-based dominance under Luis de la Fuente have kept them atop trader consensus, while France’s blend of experience and athleticism continues to underpin their strong implied probability despite minor roster tweaks. England’s attacking options and improved organization add further parity, with Brazil and Argentina providing South American counterbalance through star quality and historical pedigree. Minor injury concerns and final squad confirmations across these contenders underscore the narrow margins separating the leaders.
